title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 October 2025

summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 11/10/2025
The Indian market remains very weak, with prices declining daily and no signs of recovery. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Contact: +971 4575 4667 Visit : www.best-oasis.com Email: bol@bol.ae

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market remains very weak, with prices declining daily and no signs of
recovery. Overall demand in local markets has dropped sharply, partly due to the
government's continued restriction on reusing ship-recycled scrap for cold rolling.
